Name: Angela Inostroza-Hoffman
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Amazing and witty reporting.

Name: MD
Title: Student
Testimonial: Man, I’ll miss your stuff.

Name: Jad M
Title: UCLA Student
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan" is pretty good, at least for a USC operation!

Name: Amy Contreras
Title: Student
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan is unforgettable. I would read it for breakfast. What a run!

Name: Natalie Aguiar
Title: Staff
Testimonial: One of the highlights of my workdays.

Name: Natalie LamJohnson
Title: Student
Testimonial: Always the first email I open in the morning. You make my day Tomo Chien.

Name: Karan L.
Title: Student
Testimonial: Tomo Chien is a genius. If you don't believe me, just ask his mom: https://www.youtube.com/live/pKWNtjXYY2M?si=QHZidhcpulb3ukbi&t=1590

Name: Lesli Y.
Title: Parent
Testimonial: A more meaningful and informative resource than anything I’ve received from the school.

Name: Shelly Lewis
Title: Staff
Testimonial: A must-read to find out what was happening across the university, especially in the last year with the financial troubles.

Name: Trenton P
Title: Student
Testimonial: Tomo is my super idol

Name: Jasmine Guzman
Title: Student
Testimonial: Reading it was my favorite thing to do in the morning when I got to campus.

Name: Jack Hallinan
Title: Alum
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan was the best goddamn student journalism I ever saw in my time at USC.

Name: Elia M.
Title: Both Staff and Alum
Testimonial: I will miss the morning newsletters as I read them on my way to work.

Name: helen highland
Title: Student
Testimonial: The most consistent thing I’ve ever done is reading this newsletter in my morning mandatory attendance class.

Name: Naoimh B
Title: Student
Testimonial: It kept me updated on everything around me in a way that no other news platform has done.

Name: Nichelle M.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: It felt genuine in a world where there’s so much fake news.

Name: AB
Title: Multiple
Testimonial: Astounding scoops, natural wit, and a genuine sense of the human behind the work. If Tomo represents the future of journalism, we're in good hands.

Name: Emily Anderson
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: You have that rarest of all gifts (seen mainly otherwise at dysfunctional Thanksgiving family dinners): the ability simultaneously to satirize and love the community of which you are a part.

Name: Laura Castañeda
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Tomo, you’ve made everyone very proud!

Name: Ava Khan
Title: Student
Testimonial: Loved the humor and the voice!

Name: CJ
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Made my morning, learned so much! Always looked forward to it.

Name: Jessica S.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: The only newsletter I read every morning when I log into work.

Name: Jane Latman
Title: Parent
Testimonial: Responsibly reported and well-written. You brought humor to the work.

Name: Gerald Davison
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: It's helped me stay informed as well as entertained.

Name: Happy Wang
Title: Student
Testimonial: I read the email literally every weekday!

Name: Tim Stanton
Title: Staff
Testimonial: A terrific source of solid reporting and humor.

Name: Gabe Ariza
Title: Staff
Testimonial: The highlight of my morning routine.

Name: Jonathan K
Title: Staff
Testimonial: An invaluable resource for honest reporting about USC. A great source for students, staff, and faculty alike.

Name: Marshell Miller Barber
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Very informative and funny at times. I'm going to miss it.

Name: Travis S.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan was the best daily list since Letterman's Top Ten.

Name: Sam Nora
Title: Alum
Testimonial: The news of Morning, Trojan shutting down has truly darkened my day.

Name: Lyr Colin-Pacheco
Title: Grad Student/TA
Testimonial: I always appreciated your irreverence and the way you were able to speak true to, well, anything happening on campus.

Name: Ethan Louie
Title: Student
Testimonial: My favorite source for USC news. Funny and actually covers issues students care about. It's been a consistent way to start my day for the last year. I'll miss it.

Name: Marco Papa
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Thanks for the great coverage.

Name: Taylor S
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Thanks for keeping it real for the staff. We always know we will get the real scoop from y'all.

Name: Alex Knoll
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Funny, informative and highly entertaining. It inspires great banter with my colleagues and will be greatly missed! It's truly our Trojan "The Daily Show.

Name: Marisa E.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Epic reporting!

Name: Sharina S
Title: Alum
Testimonial: Your hard work at the newsletter let us know more about our school. I enjoy reading it.

Name: Laura F
Title: Parent
Testimonial: It has kept me up to date on campus news, and I never missed it!

Name: Carol C.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: I could not believe this newsletter, which is head and shoulders above most newsy newsletters out there, was produced by a single, self-funded undergraduate student. The USC community has been a better place because of his voice.

Name: Lance Ignon
Title: Staff
Testimonial: America would be better informed if more journalists wrote like Tomo. He combines dogged reporting with refreshing snark and humor to produce some of the best copy around.

Name: Nora Rakoci
Title: Student
Testimonial: The highlight of my morning ever since subscribing! It has become a little ritual of mine to sit down to eat breakfast and go through the newsletter (or read it as I scroll in bed on the lazy days).

Name: Alexia R
Title: Student
Testimonial: How will I possibly survive my 8 a.m. classes if not by scrolling through my email and reading the absolute gem that is the Morning, Trojan newsletter? I am inconsolable.

Name: Jeremy P.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Kudos to having built a brand within four years that most media would kill to have.

Name: Lisa M
Title: Prospective Student
Testimonial: Thank you <3

Name: Aimee Ge
Title: Student
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan means a lot to me and it was the first thing that helped me feel connected to the campus when I came here in August.

Name: Amy Becerra
Title: Staff
Testimonial: I read Morning, Trojan every day, and it became such a valuable source of transparency at USC — especially in spaces where that kind of openness often feels lacking.

Name: MP
Title: Student
Testimonial: Some of the most ridiculous things about this campus were perfectly phrased by Tomo in the most hilarious ways a sentence could be phrased.

Name: Kathy Wong
Title: Staff, prev alum and parent
Testimonial: I skim through Morning, Trojan first thing in the morning as a trusted source of news on USC.  Enjoyed it much and shall miss this news source.

Name: Amelia Jones
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Morning Trojan was a lifesaver — both for facts and laughs. Conveying the darkness with a sense of humor has been such a winning combo.

Name: Belen Robles
Title: Former employee
Testimonial: I loved reading your newsletter. It definitely made me chuckle and kept me very informed throughout the year.

Name: Chris H
Title: Parent
Testimonial: Really enjoyed getting Morning Trojan. Sorry to see it end !!

Name: mo
Title: Student
Testimonial: ur awsome and the skills to inevestigate are superior

Name: Dan Clancy
Title: Alum
Testimonial: This was a fantastic newsletter and is far and away the best source of info on USC and LA

Name: Amy C.
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: I've been a reader, enjoyer, and avid screenshotter.

Name: Samarth Sogani
Title: Student
Testimonial: Without fail, I read the Morning Trojan everyday. Engaging, informing, and always humorous.

Name: Ken Fischer
Title: Emeritus Faculty
Testimonial: I have loved your posts.

Name: Jane B
Title: Former employee of 19 years
Testimonial: I have appreciated being kept abreast of things that have been going on at the university.

Name: Daphne Baldassari
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: It has been a joy reading the newsletter and staying attuned with what is happening at USC and outside.

Name: Gale Sinatra
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: I find it so hard to keep up with what is happening on campus because USC's official communications are not integrated. Morning, Trojan was great for making sure I learned the top news.

Name: Tracy D.
Title: Parent
Testimonial: Mom of second-year from Pennsylvania. I've enjoyed your newsletter immensely. I read Morning, Trojan every day at lunch. (3 hour time difference.) Thank you for letting me in on West Coast news while on the East Coast.

Name: Matthew H.
Title: Student
Testimonial: Such a daily fun read and kept me updated and entertained during my years as a Trojan!

Name: Ari RM
Title: Alum
Testimonial: It has been amazing to watch you and this newsletter grow.

Name: Nate Sloan
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Feeling surprisingly emotional saying goodbye to this column! You brought news, humor, and sanity to my inbox everyday. Morning, Trojan kept me informed and gave me great talking points for the classroom and faculty meetings alike.

Name: Mani Nagayanallur
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Our team really loved Morning, Trojan over the past few years.

Name: Unnatee K
Title: Student
Testimonial: I’ll really miss the daily news that hit my inbox every weekday morning :(  I applaud you for making a newspaper that was both transparent and hilarious

Name: Emma B.
Title: Student
Testimonial: Since I started here last year, I have depended on Morning, Trojan to deliver USC-related news! It's such an awesome source

Name: Monica R.
Title: Parent
Testimonial: I am going to miss your morning snark. Your newsletter was the email I looked forward to most every day.

Name: Mary Posatko
Title: Alum
Testimonial: The absolute best

Name: Paul Kovich
Title: Staff
Testimonial: I enjoyed reading your latest news and scoops about our university.

Name: Pamela H
Title: Parent
Testimonial: You make us laugh! Thanks for the succinct and clear news.

Name: Lily V
Title: Student
Testimonial: I seriously love this newsletter and i'm going to miss it so much

Name: Jenny L.
Title: Student
Testimonial: I've always loved seeing the updates and found out so much USC "breaking news" through the newsletter.

Name: Akilah
Title: Parent
Testimonial: You kept me in the know for what is going on at school and around the school. My son was even impressed because at times I was telling him what was going on ha ha ha!

Name: Marlene Gaw
Title: Parent
Testimonial: I really appreciated the stories you chose to report on and the humor you delivered it with.

Name: Adrian L
Title: Student
Testimonial: Loved the reads!

Name: JH
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: The humor and boldness from your newsletter made the past year tolerable. The USC community thanks you. I think some people take themselves too seriously, especially those in academia, and this newsletter helped put things in perspective.

Name: Setsuko Sato
Title: Parent
Testimonial: Your daily dedication to the newsletter throughout four years of college has been amazing to watch.

Name: Char B.
Title: Parent
Testimonial: I have been a USC mom for the past two years and reading Morning, Trojan every day has been one of my favorite things.

Name: Sara Zambrano
Title: Parent
Testimonial: I have truly enjoyed reading your informative daily posts sprinkled with a bit of humor and sass.

Name: Quratulain Bhatti
Title: Alum
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan has been my primary source of news about the big things happening on campus that were too complicated for me to understand.

Name: Barry Albrecht
Title: Alum
Testimonial: I discovered Morning Trojan far too late and am now deeply depressed that it's going away. The newsletter was a must-read as soon as it hit my inbox every morning.

Name: Matthew Suh
Title: Student
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan has been a staple of my daily routine since my freshman year. It’s the first email I open every single morning.

Name: Anna Kanauka
Title: Alum
Testimonial: It was apparent that you had good contacts and plenty of people in the know contributing.

Name: wansun song
Title: Parent
Testimonial: I look forward to the current news each weekday morning as a way to stay in touch with the USC community that my youngest daughter is inhabiting.

Name: Errol Stambler
Title: Father of 3 went to usc, wife alumni of USC. My money went to tuition
Testimonial: Informed and laughed each morning

Name: Ellen Landrum
Title: Student
Testimonial: Sometimes (more than I’d like to admit) Morning, Trojan is the only thing keeping me tethered to print journalism. It has brought some of the most important headlines of my time here at USC to my attention, and I will greatly miss it.

Name: Dierdre Laterman
Title: Parent
Testimonial: It has helped me stay connected to what is happening on campus as well as the broader LA area.

Name: Alicia g
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Love reading it. it will be missed

Name: Gabriel Kahn
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan will be missed.

Name: John Vidale
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: The most interesting and relevant email each morning.

Name: Richard Green
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: I am more in the know about goings-on at the place I work because of it.

Name: Darlene B
Title: Parent
Testimonial: On more than one occasion I enjoyed observing my son’s reaction to me having knowledge of specific topics or events. He seemed somewhat mystified by how I could have come by this information,  and I will miss that opportunity.

Name: Sam Youngman
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Morning Trojan has been a must-read, and I will miss it — and Tomo's brilliant sense of humor — dearly.

Name: Becky H
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: You have provided the right mix of insightful news and fun fodder of SC.

Name: Charlotte Ann
Title: Alum
Testimonial: This newsletter has me looking forward to my inbox every morning. It's been a great source of USC and other headlines and I'm going to sincerely miss it.

Name: CB
Title: Student
Testimonial: i love morning trojan. it isn’t afraid to give out raw news that other usc news places don’t.

Name: Annie B.
Title: Alum
Testimonial: Love the bright tone, and the tough (yet fair) reporting!

Name: Madison Shaw
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Morning, Trojan is like getting the news from a friend who actually knows what’s going on but refuses to be boring about it.

Name: Serena Yang
Title: Student
Testimonial: I love Morning Trojan.

Name: Janet Hoskins
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: This newsletter is funny, irreverent and has been a refreshing if astringent comment on both academic and public life at USC. I wish there were more students like this at USC.

Name: Esther K. Chae
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Tomo offered clear insights to what was actually going on, on campus, with great humor. That made some painful USC news more bearable.

Name: LD
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: In the midst of actively unsubscribing to many other emailed news sources, I've kept yours, because I read it and access timely, relevant news.

Name: Lisa Bitel
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: Always served fresh with a modest dollop of uncontainable humor. I am sad to see some of the smartest and most sensible writing produced at the university disappear into the digital archive.

Name: Aspen Cole
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Morning Trojan has been my primary and regular news source for USC related information. It truly improved my quality of life.

Name: Blake B
Title: Student
Testimonial: The news articles were super helpful. A lot of this information I couldn't find or actively search for elsewhere.

Name: Pauline B
Title: Parent
Testimonial: Thank you for this newsletter so that this mother-far-away could keep up with the local news while my kid was away at college.

Name: Johanna
Title: Staff
Testimonial: You're hilarious!

Name: Jenn d.
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: I came for the content but stayed for the writing style and snark, and respect someone who will use profanity in polite company. I truly found it indispensable and am really sad it will go the way of the dodo.

Name: Kat G
Title: Staff
Testimonial: A valuable resource to understand what's happening at USC.

Name: Sarah M.
Title: Staff
Testimonial: Tomo's news sense is matched only by his sense of humor — and appreciation for the ironic (and absurd). Not the hero USC deserved but the hero we needed. ¡Viva Morning, Trojan!

Name: Max Matt
Title: Student
Testimonial: Amazing, funny, and genuinely entertaining.

Name: Robin Mitchell Stroud
Title: Staff
Testimonial: My favorite news resource!

Name: Violet Wang
Title: Student
Testimonial: I couldn't tell you the number of times I've eagerly screenshotted a headline to send to my friends, talked about you or your news with the Sack of Troy, or the amount of times I have lovingly stared at your decadent face, which is taped to my wall, next to my Carol Folt dartboard.

Name: Jessi K
Title: Staff
Testimonial: You've changed the game for sure!

Name: Jamila Turalba-Khalil
Title: Student
Testimonial: I read it everyday and it is very helpful to know what’s going on at USC and the LA area especially if you aren’t local.

Name: Claudia A
Title: Staff
Testimonial: I truly enjoyed the diverse content covered.

Name: kd
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: One of the best reads regarding breaking news on Campus as well as in the Los Angeles area.

Name: Andrea Harrow
Title: Faculty
Testimonial: It was good while it lasted. Keep the candor!

Name: MaryJo P
Title: Parent
Testimonial: My daughter started in the MFA screenwriting program last Fall and I love hearing all the news from her new home!

Name: Dahlia Sarmiento
Title: Student
Testimonial: Tomo is the voice that has brought USC students from all across the RSO, major/minor, and cultural spectrum together. Whether it’s reporting on budget cuts, housing, elections, or greek life— he approaches every topic with both necessary professionalism and placating humor.

Name: Annie H.
Title: Former faculty
Testimonial: Bright, witty, insightful and important journalism!

Name: Annenberg Media
Testimonial: A must-read among those closely following university developments.

Name: Daily Trojan
Testimonial: The most popular newsletter at USC.

Name: Creator Spotlight
Testimonial: The most essential newsletter for a 70,000-plus-person college community.

Name: West Coast Media Jobs
Testimonial: A daily must-read filled with scoops for USC students, faculty, and high-level admins alike.

Name: The Nutgraf
Testimonial: A dominant force in USC’s student media ecosystem.

Name: Poynter
Testimonial: An outlier in the student media world.

Name: The Sack of Troy
Testimonial: Fuck you Tomo
